body: @marchollinger Please run `starship module php` with `$env:STARSHIP_LOG='trace'` and post the logs. `context.exec_cmd` does not run the command via a shell, so escaping (of the command itself) does not need to be adjusted for any OS.

```
[TRACE] - (starship): Parsed arguments: Cli {
    command: Module {
        name: Some(
            "php",
        ),
        list: false,
        properties: Properties {
            status_code: None,
            pipestatus: None,
            terminal_width: 80,
            path: None,
            logical_path: None,
            cmd_duration: None,
            keymap: "viins",
            jobs: 0,
            shlvl: None,
        },
    },
}
[TRACE] - (starship::utils): Trying to read from "C:\\Users\\march\\.config\\starship.toml"
[TRACE] - (starship::utils): File read successfully
[TRACE] - (starship::config): Config file content: "
format = """
[ΓûæΓûÆΓûô](bg: prev_bg)\
$username\
$os\
$directory\
$git_branch\
$git_commit\
$git_state\
$git_status\
$git_metrics\
$ruby\
$conda\
$lua\
$python\
$julia\
$nodejs\
$rust\
$golang\
$c\
$cpp\
$php\
$time\
[εé┤ ](fg:color_gray3)\
$fill\
$status\
$cmd_duration\
\n$character"""



palette = 'everforest'
[palettes.everforest]
color_gray0 = '#a6b0a0'
color_gray1 = '#939f91'
color_gray2 = '#829181'
color_gray3 = '#7a8478'
color_gray4 = '#859289'
color_gray5 = '#9da9a0'
color_php = '#8c6fff'
color_julia = '#4b74fe'
color_c = '#aabbce'
color_cpp = '#659bd3'
color_golang = '#769ff0'
color_rust = '#ff770b'

[fill]
symbol = ' '

[os]
disabled = false
style = "inverted"
format = '[ $symbol]($style)'
[os.symbols]
Arch = "∩îâ"
Fedora = "≤░ú¢"
Linux = "≤░î╜"
Macos = "ε£æ"
Manjaro = "∩îÆ"
Ubuntu = "ε»ë"
Windows = "≤░ì▓"

[username]
disabled = false
style_user = 'inverted cyan'
style_root = 'inverted red'
format = '[ $user ]($style)'

[directory]
style = "inverted"
format = "[ $path ]($style)"
truncation_length = 3
truncation_symbol = "ΓÇª/"
truncate_to_repo = true

[git_branch]
symbol = "∩Éÿ"
style = "inverted purple"
format = '[[ $symbol $branch ]($style)]($style)'

[git_status]
style = "inverted purple"
format = '([$ahead_behind$all_status ]($style))'
ahead = '${count}Γçí'
behind = '${count}Γçú'
diverged = '${ahead_count}Γçí${behind_count}ΓçúΓçò'

[git_commit]
format = '[\($hash$tag\) ]($style)'
style = "inverted purple"

[git_state]
style = "inverted purple"
format = '[\($state($progress_current/$progress_total)\) ]($style)'

[lua]
symbol = "εÿá"
style = "inverted blue"
format = '[ $symbol( $version) ]($style)'

[nodejs]
symbol = "ε£ÿ"
style = "inverted green"
not_capable_style = "inverted red"
format = '[ $symbol( $version)( !\($engines_version\)) ]($style)'

[rust]
symbol = "ε₧¿"
style = "inverted fg:color_rust"
format = '[ $symbol( $version) ]($style)'

[golang]
symbol = "εÿº"
style = "inverted fg:color_golang"
format = '[ $symbol( $version) ]($style)'

[php]
symbol = "εÿê"
style = "inverted fg:color_php"
format = '[ $symbol( $version) ]($style)'

[ruby]
symbol = "ε¡ê"
style = "inverted red"
format = '[ $symbol( $version) ]($style)'

[julia]
symbol = "εÿñ"
style = "inverted fg:color_julia"
format = '[ $symbol( $version) ]($style)'

[python]
symbol = "ε£╝"
style = "inverted yellow"
pyenv_prefix = ""
pyenv_version_name = false
format = '[ $symbol( $virtualenv)( $version) ]($style)'

[conda]
symbol = "∩äî"
ignore_base = false
style = "inverted green"
format = '[ $symbol $environment ]($style)'

[c]
symbol = "εÿ₧"
style = "inverted fg:color_c"
format = '[ $symbol $version(-$name) ]($style)'

[cpp]
disabled = false
symbol = "εÿ¥"
style = "inverted fg:color_cpp"
format = '[ $symbol $version(-$name) ]($style)'

[time]
disabled = false
time_format = "%R" # Hour:Minute Format
style = "inverted bg: color_gray3"
format = '[ εÄä $time]($style)'

[status]
symbol = "ε¬ç "
style = "dimmed red"
format = '[$symbol$common_meaning$signal_name$maybe_int$signal_number]($style)'
map_symbol = true
disabled = false
pipestatus = true
pipestatus_format = '$pipestatus'
pipestatus_separator = '[ Γöé ](dimmed white)'
# success_symbol = "SUCCESS"
# success_style = "dimmed green"
sigint_symbol = "≤▒Éî"
signal_symbol = "≤▒Éî"
not_found_symbol = "ε¡Ä "
not_executable_symbol = "ε¬╜ "

[cmd_duration]
style = 'dimmed yellow'
format = '  [$duration]($style)'
"
```

It looks like starship doesn't detect any relevant files for php? Is there any `.php`, `composer.json`, or `.php-version` file in your working directory?

I forgot to run `starship module php` in an actual php directory. 


These are the logs from running it in a directory with a `.php` file:

I installed PHP with Herd. I found that the issue only occurs when the PHP on PATH is the `php.bat` script in `C:\Users\march\.config\herd\bin\`. When I change PATH to use `C:\Users\march\.config\herd\bin\php84\` the version is displayed correctly. 

The `php.bat` script contains the following code and it's used to point to the global PHP version selected in Herd.

```cmd
@echo off
"C:\Users\march\.config\herd\bin\php84\php.exe" %*
```

These are the logs from `starship module php` when using `php.exe` instead of `php.bat`:

I think in this case, it could be due to characters not being escaped correctly because the batch script passes the arguments on to `php.exe`.
In version v1.18.2 and earlier, the PHP version number could be displayed normally. Starting from v1.19.0, it is no longer displayed.
